channel.title: jq on pieterjd.be
channel.description: Recent content in jq on pieterjd.be
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Regular Expressions with JQ
item.description: I needed to go through the properties of a JSON object and filter out the desired ones. Although not a big object, I didn’t feel like doing it by hand. A nice use-case for JQ!

item.title: Detect duplicates with JQ
item.description: While working on a bug, I needed to go through JSON file containing a few thousand objects. Some objects had a duplicate id value causing errors. A nice use-case for JQ!
